system.effect: The caster summons a cage to capture any number of targets in a 10m x 10m square. The cage has a 3m tall ceiling. The bars of the cage are coated with any number of toxic chemicals, psychedelics, or razor-sharp blades. Everyone trapped in the cage must roll to resist a Virulence 9 poison that does 1 point of damage every round. Breaking the cage requires a STR/10+ roll, and automatically does 2d6 damage to anyone making the attempt.
system.critSuccess: The poison is Virulence 10 and does 1D3 points of damage.
